# Jobnest

> Free job application tracker with AI resume scanning, NESTAi AI job coach, interview manager, and career tools.

Jobnest helps job seekers organise their job search. Track every application, scan resumes against job descriptions for ATS keyword gaps, get AI coaching from NESTAi, manage interviews and follow-up reminders, compare salary offers, and store all career documents in one place.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://jobnest.nishpatel.dev/): Landing page with product overview, features, and pricing
- [Pricing](https://jobnest.nishpatel.dev/pricing): Free and Pro plans; student discount available
- [Contact](https://jobnest.nishpatel.dev/contact): Contact form for support and feedback

## Key features

- **Application tracker**: Log job applications with company, role, status, salary, notes, source, and job description. Statuses: Applied, Phone Screen, Interview, Offer, Rejected, Withdrawn, Ghosted.
- **ATS Scanner**: Upload a resume (PDF/DOCX) and paste a job description. Powered by Groq Llama, OpenAI GPT-4o mini, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, or Perplexity. Returns a keyword match score (0–100), missing keywords, and improvement suggestions.
- **NESTAi**: AI job search coach with full context of your applications, documents, and interviews. Powered by Groq Llama 3.3 70B. Supports file attachments, markdown responses, suggested follow-ups, and chat history.
- **Document Library**: Upload and version resumes, cover letters, and supporting documents. Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, PNG, JPEG up to 1 GB total. Virus scanned on upload. Shareable links with expiry.
- **Interview tracker**: Schedule and log interviews with type, round, outcome, and notes.
- **Reminders**: Manual and auto-generated follow-up reminders at Day 7, 14, and 21 for applied positions.
- **Salary comparison**: Log and compare total compensation across offers including base, bonus, equity, and benefits.
- **Completeness scoring**: Each application is scored out of 10 based on filled fields. Shown as a ring on the application list.
- **Work authorization**: US visa status stored in profile and injected into NESTAi context.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Unlimited applications, NESTAi AI coach, ATS scanning, interview tracker, reminders, document storage (50 MB), salary comparison.
- **Pro**: $9/month or $90/year. Everything in Free plus 1 GB document storage, advanced analytics, priority support.
- Student discount available for .edu and academic email domains.

## Technical

- Built with Next.js 16, Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage), Tailwind CSS.
- AI: Groq (primary), OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Perplexity (ATS scanner).
- Email: SMTP via Nodemailer. Cron jobs via Vercel Cron.
- Security: CSRF protection, Redis-backed rate limiting, magic-byte file validation, Cloudmersive AV scanning, GDPR/CCPA compliant.

## Creator

Built by Nish Patel (https://nishpatel.dev). Open to feedback at https://jobnest.nishpatel.dev/contact.
